name: CT Colonography (Virtual Colonoscopy)
description: CT colonography for colorectal cancer screening

findings.technique: CT colonography was performed in supine and prone positions following colonic preparation and air insufflation.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Colon
sections.content: The colon demonstrates [no masses / no polyps / no filling defects]. The colonic lumen is [adequately distended / well-visualized].

sections.name: Rectum
sections.content: The rectum is [normal / no mass / no polyps]. The rectal wall is [not thickened].

sections.name: Cecum
sections.content: The cecum and appendix are [normal / no appendiceal mass / no cecal pathology].

sections.name: Extracolonic
sections.content: The extracolonic structures demonstrate [no significant abnormality / no renal mass / no liver lesion]. No incidental finding requiring action.

impression:
1. CT colonography is negative. No polyp or mass identified.
2. Recommended routine screening per guidelines.
author: RadReport Templates
